subject: Upgrade to Unlimited 5G for Seamless Connectivity!
body:
Hi Sophie,

We hope you're enjoying your Samsung Galaxy A54 and your current plan! With your monthly data usage of 12GB, we wanted to share an exciting upgrade opportunity that could enhance your experience.

Introducing our Unlimited 5G plan! For just £55 a month, you can enjoy unlimited 5G data, unlimited calls and texts, and even 10GB of EU roaming included. This means you can stream, game, and work from anywhere without ever worrying about data limits again.

As a valued subscriber for over a year, we believe this upgrade could significantly enhance your mobile experience, especially with your active usage patterns.

Don’t miss out on this chance to elevate your connectivity! Click here to upgrade today and enjoy seamless browsing and streaming.

Best regards,
Your Telco Team
